scripts.build:lambdas: cd lambda/cmd && for dir in */; do (cd "$dir" && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -tags lambda.norpc -o bootstrap main.go && echo "✓ Built $dir"); done
scripts.deploy:frontend-build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.deploy: npm run build:lambdas && npm run deploy:storage && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run config:write && npm run deploy:notification && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:eventbridge && npm run deploy:routes && npm run dcv:download && npm run deploy:frontend-build && npm run deploy:frontend-deployment && npm run clean:lambdas
scripts.deploy:release: cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm run deploy:storage && npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run config:write && npm run deploy:notification && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:eventbridge && npm run deploy:routes && npm run dcv:download && npm run deploy:frontend-build && npm run deploy:frontend-deployment
